title: Vacancy for a finance manager
body: "Your key responsibilities will include:    Budget and finance - profiling of the budget to ensure that sufficient funds are allocated to individual areas of work. Is responsible for the production of a monthly forecast of expenditure.   Procurement - support the Inspectorate and Business Support Manager to facilitate the administration of any contract issued on the procurement of goods and services.   Purchase orders - responsible for this end-to-end process.   Invoice payment – responsible for liaising with the requestor to ensure all goods and services were delivered as agreed, and processing all invoices within prompt government payment targets.   Marine Accident Investigators’ International Forum – act as the treasurer, liaise with the Chief Inspector of Marine Accidents to ensure all countries’ invoices are paid and produce an annual audit report.   Receipts – payments of any nature made to the MAIB for work carried out are to be paid into the appropriate DfT bank account.   General administrative duties – responsible for the provision of general administrative support to the Head of Business Support.     For further information about this position and how to apply see: Civil Service Jobs, Finance Manager, Ref: 427218   Closing date: 28 September 2025 "
